description: Red Lion Crimson 3.0 is open. An automotive metal stamping plant relies on a 1000-ton mechanical power press. Configure 4 base load-cell tags (LC_LF, LC_RF, LC_LR, LC_RR) and 3 calculated tags (Total_Tonnage, Imbalance_LR, and Imbalance_FR) to monitor press tonnage and imbalance in real-time. Use the specifications in 'press_sensor_register.csv' and 'imbalance_calculation_narrative.txt' located in the Desktop\CrimsonTasks folder for tag ranges, mathematical logic, and alarm thresholds. Ensure the calculated tags and the High/High-High alarms on the imbalance tags are correctly implemented according to the provided documentation. Save the project as 'press_tonnage.c3' in C:\Users\Docker\Documents\CrimsonProjects\. Login credentials: Docker / GymAnything123!
